raw_source.title: [杭州] Exocore 诚聘 区块链研发工程师
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍

Founded in 2023, Exogenous, Inc. is a software technology company building Exocore, an omnichain pooled security protocol powering an open market for decentralized trust. Exocore is a blockchain infrastructure that connects to other L1 blockchains to allow restaking of existing staked L1 tokens or LSDs (liquid staking derivatives) to supply token-economic security to off-chain middleware protocols or applications. Restaking is a new category in the industry with huge potential to reshape how security is modeled and utilized by various security-focused applications.

### Core Team
Warren Paul Anderson, Co-founder and CEO
[Warren](https://www.linkedin.com/in/warpaul1/) has been working full time in crypto and web3 for ten years. Warren was the CEO of [Discreet Labs](https://discreetlabs.io/) to lead a team of over 80 engineers and operators building scalable privacy systems using zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP) for web3. 

Rongjian (”RJ”) Lan, Co-founder and CTO 
[RJ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rongjianlan/) has been working full-time in the blockchain space since 2018. Previously, RJ was the Co-founder and CTO of [Harmony](https://www.harmony.one/), where he led the development of the Harmony blockchain, which pioneered the introduction of sharding to PoS networks.

Raluca Ada Popa, Co-founder & Research Advisor
[Raluca](https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~raluca/) is an Associate Professor of Computer Science at UC Berkeley. Her research focuses on applied cryptography and security systems. Raluca also serves as a Director of [Sky Lab at UC Berkeley,](https://sky.cs.berkeley.edu/) where she leads a research group focused on decentralized trust and security.

## 薪资福利待遇

25K - 60K RMB or equivalent in USD

## 地点

- 工作地点：杭州
- 联系方式：rj@exogenous.io (请附上简历, github ID 或者 代码作品）

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：可商量

## 岗位要求、职责

### About the Role:

The Blockchain Protocol Engineer will work on the design and implementation of a high performance blockchain infrastructure with various components to enable the functionality of Exocore’s omnichain restaking system. You will be focused on implementation of a consensus algorithm, light-client bridges, TSS (Threshold Signature Scheme) signing, P2P networks, chain DB, VMs etc.

You will work with a globally distributed team of top-tier engineers and collaborate with top researchers in cryptography and blockchain protocols, to implement the best blockchain technology in a secure and efficient way. 

### Job Description**:**

- Design and implement a complex blockchain protocol that is efficient and secure.
- Collaborate with a global engineering team for ideation and problem solving on the protocol development.
- Study and implement a state-of-the-art consensus algorithm, light-client bridges and TSS cryptographic signature scheme.
- Benchmark and improve the stability and performance of Exocore network.
- Participate in open source development and community discussion on the protocol design and technology choices.
- Write sufficient testing code on the protocol to ensure its correct functionality.

### Job Requirement**:**

- Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science and related majors.
- 3+ years experience on production-level code development on large scale systems using Go, Java, C++ or Rust.
- 1+ years of experience on blockchain protocols or related systems.
- Passionate about blockchain technology and demonstrated ability to learn new technology quickly.
- Ability to write clean, readable and efficient code with sufficient comments.
- Critical thinking and ability to understand the inner working of complex systems.
- Ability to write code logic involving concurrency or parallelism.
- Good communication skills on conveying complicated ideas and writing technical documentations.
- Willingness to adapt to new technology or area of focus quickly.

### Preferred Skills:

- Hands on experience with Cloud Deployments (Native Cloud AWS and/or Azure)
- Understanding of Distributed Systems, P2P network or Virtual Machines.
- Good understanding and hands-on experience working with EVM.
- Experience with smart contract development.
- Experience on cryptography development or usage.

narrative: ## 公司/团队介绍

Founded in 2023, Exogenous, Inc. is a software technology company building Exocore, an omnichain pooled security protocol powering an open market for decentralized trust. Exocore is a blockchain infrastructure that connects to other L1 blockchains to allow restaking of existing staked L1 tokens or LSDs (liquid staking derivatives) to supply token-economic security to off-chain middleware protocols or applications. Restaking is a new category in the industry with huge potential to reshape how security is modeled and utilized by various security-focused applications.

### Core Team Warren Paul Anderson, Co-founder and CEO [Warren](https://www.linkedin.com/in/warpaul1/) has been working full time in crypto and web3 for ten years. Warren was the CEO of [Discreet Labs](https://discreetlabs.io/) to lead a team of over 80 engineers and operators building scalable privacy systems using zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP) for web3.

Rongjian (”RJ”) Lan, Co-founder and CTO [RJ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rongjianlan/) has been working full-time in the blockchain space since 2018. Previously, RJ was the Co-founder and CTO of [Harmony](https://www.harmony.one/), where he led the development of the Harmony blockchain, which pioneered the introduction of sharding to PoS networks.

Raluca Ada Popa, Co-founder & Research Advisor [Raluca](https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~raluca/) is an Associate Professor of Computer Science at UC Berkeley. Her research focuses on applied cryptography and security systems. Raluca also serves as a Director of [Sky Lab at UC Berkeley,](https://sky.cs.berkeley.edu/) where she leads a research group focused on decentralized trust and security.
## 薪资福利待遇
25K - 60K RMB or equivalent in USD
## 地点
- 工作地点：杭州 - 联系方式：rj@exogenous.io (请附上简历, github ID 或者 代码作品）
## 工作性质
- 是否全职：是 - 是否远程：可商量
## 岗位要求、职责
### About the Role:

The Blockchain Protocol Engineer will work on the design and implementation of a high performance blockchain infrastructure with various components to enable the functionality of Exocore’s omnichain restaking system. You will be focused on implementation of a consensus algorithm, light-client bridges, TSS (Threshold Signature Scheme) signing, P2P networks, chain DB, VMs etc.

You will work with a globally distributed team of top-tier engineers and collaborate with top researchers in cryptography and blockchain protocols, to implement the best blockchain technology in a secure and efficient way.
### Job Description**:**

- Design and implement a complex blockchain protocol that is efficient and secure. - Collaborate with a global engineering team for ideation and problem solving on the protocol development. - Study and implement a state-of-the-art consensus algorithm, light-client bridges and TSS cryptographic signature scheme. - Benchmark and improve the stability and performance of Exocore network. - Participate in open source development and community discussion on the protocol design and technology choices. - Write sufficient testing code on the protocol to ensure its correct functionality.
### Job Requirement**:**

- Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science and related majors. - 3+ years experience on production-level code development on large scale systems using Go, Java, C++ or Rust. - 1+ years of experience on blockchain protocols or related systems. - Passionate about blockchain technology and demonstrated ability to learn new technology quickly. - Ability to write clean, readable and efficient code with sufficient comments. - Critical thinking and ability to understand the inner working of complex systems. - Ability to write code logic involving concurrency or parallelism. - Good communication skills on conveying complicated ideas and writing technical documentations. - Willingness to adapt to new technology or area of focus quickly.
### Preferred Skills:

- Hands on experience with Cloud Deployments (Native Cloud AWS and/or Azure) - Understanding of Distributed Systems, P2P network or Virtual Machines. - Good understanding and hands-on experience working with EVM. - Experience with smart contract development. - Experience on cryptography development or usage.
